items.name: Devil Sword Vergil | DMC/Devil May Cry 5
items.description:
"All things end, Dante - even us."

A blade of sin that was created when Vergil merged the legendary katana Yamato with his own human flesh and skin, birthing a weapon so powerful that even a devil may cry. Similar to his brother's sword, this blade has a look akin to Vergil's Sin Devil Trigger form.
Thanks to @Twiggy435 for being the first one to buy this accessory!!

Unsheathed Version - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/125899588777868/Devil-Sword-Vergil-Unsheathed
Matching Coat - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/119584545106100/Vergils-motivation-coat-DMC5/
My other accessories: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?CatalogContext=1&Category=1&CreatorName=req_ng&salesTypeFilter=1
